basic_details.job_title: MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Executive Engineer, Manager and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Maharashtra State Electricity Board Holding Company (MSEBHCL)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit for all posts is 55 years. Age will be calculated as on 11-06-2026. No age relaxation details are provided in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering/ Technology, B.COM. and MBA (Finance) OR M.Com., B.COM. or Equivalent
qualification.details: Executive Engineer: Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering/ Technology. Additional Executive Engineer: Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering/ Technology. Manager (F&A): B.COM. and MBA (Finance) OR M.Com. UDC (Accounts): B.COM. or Equivalent.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for MSEBHCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.msebindia.com.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026 is 30 June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by MSEBHCL?
faq.answer: Maharashtra State Electricity Board Holding Company (MSEBHCL) has released a total of 5 vacancies for the posts of Executive Engineer, Additional Executive Engineer, Manager (F&A), and UDC (Accounts).

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the MSEBHCL posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts under MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026 is 55 years, as of 11 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post, including Bachelor's Degree in Electrical Engineering/Technology, B.COM., MBA (Finance), or M.Com. Please refer to the detailed notification for specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for MSEBHCL Recruitment 2026 will involve shortlisting of candidates followed by a personal interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the posts?
faq.answer: The salary varies significantly by post, with detailed pay scales provided for Executive Engineer, Additional Executive Engineer, Manager (F&A), and UDC (Accounts) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Maharashtra State Electricity Board Holding Company (MSEBHCL), which is www.msebindia.com.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents, including photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant educational certificates.
